pageContext.name: Lou Lou La Grande (Extravaganza)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Ella Superstarr are proud to present the Lou Lou La Grande (Extravaganza) Doll.   The smarty Lou Lou is an heiress of the luxury department store  Le Grand in Paris, France. She is a famous designer and has a successful fashion brand called Lou Collection.  Seen wearing a light blue jacket, lace crop top, and frilled midi tulle skirt, Lou Lou's look is accentuated with a gold buckle belt and light blue clasp heels with a shimmery bag.  Don't miss your chance to add Lou Lou La Grande to your collection!
